SCALE 1:1 — SHEET 1 OF 1 — REV. 2024

DESIGN INTENT: CAREER ARCHITECTURE — D'AGNELLI, D.

drawing no. 001 | scale: 1:career | date: 2012-present

STRUCTURAL SYSTEM

load-bearing foundation in software engineering (accenture, milan). lateral bracing through consulting (codec, dublin; accenture, london). steel-frame management layer (deloitte, london — practice built from ground up). crown structure: senior engagement manager at c3 ai, directing $15m programme across all business units.

MATERIAL SPECIFICATIONS

primary: solution architecture, enterprise architecture, cloud engineering (aws/azure/gcp)

reinforcement: ml pipelines, llms & genai, rag systems, data engineering

finishing: programme management, stakeholder management, digital transformation

LOAD CAPACITY: 70+ resources | 100+ plant deployments | $18m ebit | nps >70

CERTIFICATIONS: prince2 practitioner | gchq-certified msc | stanford ml
